message:
feat(semantic): Add lazy model download with progress callback

- Add progress_callback support to @xenova/transformers pipeline
- Show download progress to stderr (keeps stdout clean for JSON)
- Handle offline scenarios gracefully with local_files_only fallback
- Add clear error messages with next steps for offline users
- Export ModelLoadProgress and ProgressCallback types for consumers
- Add unit tests for progress callback types

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
